race.comment: POCKETMONEY (5) was okay at the latest run when sixth over 1350m at Ipswich after she settled well back. Should be peaking now and is a great chance to break through. THE BEAR (6) continued the good recent form when he finished just a neck away in second last time out over 1350m at Ipswich. Jumps from a wide gate but is a definite danger against this line-up. HEMAN (1) showed little early speed last start and failed to come on in the straight when ninth, beaten 6 lengths, over 1350m at Ipswich. Won't find this as tough so he is one of the main contenders. THINK LIKE PADDY (3) returns from a spell of five-and-a-half months. Tuned up for this with two recent trials and comes here with definite top-three claims.
